summary: Results-driven Senior DevOps Engineer with 7 years of experience designing and implementing scalable cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines. Proven expertise in container orchestration, infrastructure automation, and maintaining high-availability systems across AWS and Azure environments. Passionate about fostering DevOps culture and reducing deployment friction through innovative tooling and practices.

bullets.text: Architected and deployed Kubernetes-based microservices platform serving 50M+ daily requests, reducing infrastructure costs by 35% through auto-scaling and resource optimization
Implemented GitOps workflows using ArgoCD and Terraform, decreasing deployment time from 2 hours to 15 minutes and achieving 99.97% uptime SLA
Led migration of legacy monolith applications to containerized services on AWS EKS, mentoring team of 4 junior engineers on cloud-native best practices
Developed comprehensive observability stack using Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK, reducing mean time to resolution (MTTR) by 60%
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitLab CI for 25+ microservices, enabling 200+ production deployments per month
Automated infrastructure provisioning with Terraform and Ansible across multi-region AWS environments, managing 300+ EC2 instances and associated resources
Implemented security hardening measures and compliance automation for PCI-DSS requirements, passing audits with zero critical findings
Established disaster recovery procedures and automated backup strategies, achieving RPO of 1 hour and RTO of 4 hours

educations.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology

projects.name: Multi-Cloud Disaster Recovery Automation
projects.desc: Designed and implemented automated disaster recovery solution spanning AWS and Azure, with one-click failover capability and continuous data replication for critical services
projects.stack: Terraform, Python, AWS Lambda, Azure Functions, PostgreSQL, Redis, Ansible

projects.name: Internal Developer Platform
projects.desc: Built self-service platform enabling developers to provision environments, deploy applications, and manage resources through unified interface, reducing environment setup time from days to minutes
projects.stack: Kubernetes, ArgoCD, Backstage, Terraform, Python, React, PostgreSQL

bullets.text: Reduced cloud infrastructure costs by $420K annually through rightsizing initiatives and implementation of spot instances
Achieved 99.97% uptime across production systems while increasing deployment frequency from weekly to multiple times daily
Spearheaded company-wide migration to Kubernetes, training 30+ developers and establishing center of excellence for container orchestration

skillGroups.items: AWS (EC2, EKS, S3, Lambda, RDS, CloudFormation), Azure (AKS, VMs, DevOps), Google Cloud Platform, Terraform, CloudFormation, Infrastructure as Code
Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, ArgoCD, Docker Compose, Amazon EKS, Azure AKS, Container Registry, Istio
Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, CircleCI, Ansible, Chef, Puppet, Bash, Python, Groovy
Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana), Datadog, New Relic, CloudWatch, Splunk, Jaeger
